caption: A man with a distinctive tall, silver-grey hairstyle and glasses is seated in a recording studio setting. He wears a white collared shirt with a bow tie and suspenders, and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a framed logo featuring a shield is mounted on the wall, and a blurred sign reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". The on-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and looking slightly to the right. His facial expressions shift subtly as he talks, while the camera remains static and the equipment and background elements stay in place.
